title: Canada Air 24-Hour Cancellation Policy
body: Tickets purchased directly from Canada Air may be cancelled within 24 hours when policy eligibility conditions are met. Account-specific refunds require verification.

title: Canada Air Ticket Change Policy
body: Travelers may request eligible ticket changes through supported channels. Payment corrections, duplicate charges, and manual booking access require staff review.

title: Canada Air Baggage Delay Policy
body: Delayed baggage reports should include itinerary, baggage tag, and destination details. Compensation eligibility depends on policy review and documentation.
